_doc: CROSS-SESSION COORDINATION BOARD (Workstream-D, 2026-06-28). ADVISORY, last-writer-wins. Every Claude session registers in `active_sessions` at start and MUST claim `merge_slot` before merging any PR, releasing it after. Purpose: serialize merges so two concurrent sessions don't both drive a merge and force each other into the behind-rebase retest churn (hit twice on 2026-06-28). The LIVE open-PR list (GitHub) is the authoritative real-time signal; this file records intent + the single merge claim. Protocol is binding: see `.claude/skills/session-coordination/SKILL.md` and `docs/CLAUDE-RULES-CANONICAL.md` (multi-session coordination). This board is NOT a hard lock — it is honour-system coordination for the small number of concurrent sessions the operator runs; the real safety net is branch-protection require-up-to-date.

schema.merge_slot: { held_by: <session_id|null>, branch: <str|null>, pr: <int|null>, claimed_at: <iso8601|null> } — at most ONE session holds this at a time. Claim before merge, clear after (merged or aborted).
schema.active_sessions: [ { session_id, branch, intent, started_at, updated_at } ] — one entry per live session; prune your own on exit. Stale entries (>24h, no matching open PR/branch) may be pruned by any session.

active_sessions.intent: M17 lead/coordination: Alpaca flagship fix (#4916/#4929, DONE), governance (#4931, DONE), zombie cleanup (#4933/#4935, DONE), M17 milestone+sprint plan (ROADMAP). Owns S-AUDIT-E (vestigial-router removal) next.

Audit Workstream-B: env-gate inventory (no new violation; NEWS_VETO_ENABLED live-armed, comments fixed) + status_check.sh ict-* enumerator for diag coverage + remove vestigial route_order/place_order router. #4942/#4943 merged.
S-AUDIT-A (Workstream-A, consistency/doc-drift): documented 8 undocumented REST endpoints + 0-orphan-call verification (PR #4936).

S-AUDIT-F: live order path line-by-line (execute.py, order_monitor.py, coordinator.py, intents.py, risk.py) — read all 13.5k lines in full; 5 comment/error-string drift fixes (Tier-1, PR #4950), no behavioural bugs found.

S-AUDIT-F web-api slice: src/web/api/main.py + all routers/*.py except accounts.py+diag.py read in full. 2 Tier-1 doc/comment-drift fixes (bot_config.py note string; CLAUDE.md /performance return-shape table) + 2 minor backlog items. No behavioural bugs, no zombie routes. Sidecar: docs/audits/s-audit-f/web-api-routers.md.

_note_unregistered: Sessions for S-AUDIT-B (zombie/env-gate) and S-AUDIT-C (consumer wiring) were launched by the operator 2026-06-28 but have not yet self-registered here — they must add their entry at preflight per the session-coordination skill. Until they do, the live open-PR list is the authoritative signal for what they're working on.
